productDisplayName: Swiss Army Women Mountain Water Perfume
description: Style Note This fresh, floral and dazzling fragrance is perfect for the active, contemporary women. She seeks a stylishly natural, clean scent to carry her through the day. This unique blend of lily of the valley, peony and fizzy ginger surrounds you with all of the glory of nature. It's the optimum fragrance for the modern, spontaneous women with natural class.Product Details Notes: lily of the valley, edelweiss, blue buttercup, peony, mountain daffodil, organic ginger root and crisp green water mintCaution Do not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyes  Quantity100 ml
